message:
feat(command): CLUSTER admin subcommands honor cluster_enabled + upstream error wording (br-frankenredis-jsr7)

Replaces the blanket "ERR This instance has cluster support disabled"
short-circuit over 13 admin subcommands with per-subcommand arity,
syntax, and cluster_enabled gating that matches upstream redis
cluster.c::clusterCommand:

  CLUSTER MEET <host> <port> [bus-port]
    arity 4|5, validates numeric port + bus-port; accept-OK for the
    no-op case (real handshake is follow-up work).

  CLUSTER FORGET / REPLICATE <node-id>
    arity 3; returns upstream-matching "ERR Unknown node <id>" because
    no node registry exists yet.

  CLUSTER REPLICAS <node-id>
    arity 3; returns "ERR The specified node is not known or can't be a
    replica".

  CLUSTER FAILOVER [FORCE | TAKEOVER]
    arity 2|3; validates flag; master-side returns "ERR You should send
    CLUSTER FAILOVER to a replica".

  CLUSTER ADDSLOTS / DELSLOTS <slot> [slot ...]
    arity ≥3; validates 0..=16383 range; accept-OK for no-op.

  CLUSTER ADDSLOTSRANGE / DELSLOTSRANGE <start> <end> [<start> <end> ...]
    arity ≥4 even; validates pairs + start<=end with upstream's
    "start slot number X is greater than end slot number Y" wording.

  CLUSTER FLUSHSLOTS
    arity 2; empty-db OK, else "ERR DB must be empty to perform
    CLUSTER FLUSHSLOTS." — matches upstream exactly.

  CLUSTER SAVECONFIG / BUMPEPOCH
    arity 2; OK / "BUMPED 1" simple-string replies (we don't yet
    persist cluster.conf or track a real configEpoch; the reply
    shapes parse correctly for clients that inspect them).

  CLUSTER SET-CONFIG-EPOCH / SLOTSTATE
    still blanket-errored — these need a real config-epoch / slot-state
    machinery that lives in fr-repl, tracked as follow-up.

Tests added (3 new, 609/0 overall in fr-command --lib):
  - cluster_admin_subcommands_honor_cluster_enabled_flag: every admin
    subcommand returns cluster_disabled_error when cluster_enabled=false
  - cluster_admin_arity_errors_match_upstream_when_wrong_argc: arity
    validation fires before the flag check with upstream wording
  - cluster_admin_happy_paths_when_cluster_enabled_return_ok_or_specific_errors:
    happy-path OK replies, MEET invalid-port error, FORGET/REPLICATE/
    REPLICAS unknown-node errors, FAILOVER master wording, slot-range
    validation with upstream "start > end" text, FLUSHSLOTS empty-vs-full
    DB paths, SAVECONFIG + BUMPEPOCH reply shapes.

Also fixes READONLY/READWRITE from the earlier c122714 (cluster_enabled
honored) — both code paths now observe the flag.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
